user_agents.name: OAI-SearchBot
user_agents.purpose: Surface websites in search results in ChatGPT's search features
user_agents.scope: Search indexing for ChatGPT search results; may use single crawl for multiple use cases
user_agents.opt_out: Disallow OAI-SearchBot in robots.txt; sites opted out will not appear in ChatGPT search answers

user_agents.name: OAI-AdsBot
user_agents.purpose: Validate safety and relevance of web pages submitted as ads on ChatGPT
user_agents.scope: Only visits pages submitted as ads; data not used for generative AI training
user_agents.opt_out: Not explicitly documented; appears to apply only to submitted ad landing pages

user_agents.name: GPTBot
user_agents.purpose: Crawl content for training generative AI foundation models
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for training data collection; automatic crawling
user_agents.opt_out: Disallow GPTBot in robots.txt; indicates site content should not be used for training

user_agents.name: ChatGPT-User
user_agents.purpose: User-triggered actions in ChatGPT and Custom GPTs including web page visits
user_agents.scope: User-initiated fetches for live responses; not automatic web crawling; GPT Actions
user_agents.opt_out: robots.txt rules may not apply; user-triggered actions; use OAI-SearchBot robots.txt for automatic crawl opt-outs

user_agents.name: ClaudeBot
user_agents.purpose: Collecting web content for training generative AI models
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for model development and safety enhancement
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: ClaudeBot / Disallow: / in robots.txt; honors Crawl-delay directives

user_agents.name: Claude-User
user_agents.purpose: Retrieve web content at user-initiated direction through Claude AI queries
user_agents.scope: User-triggered fetch for live responses to Claude user questions
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Claude-User / Disallow: / in robots.txt to prevent user-initiated retrieval

user_agents.name: Claude-SearchBot
user_agents.purpose: Crawl the web to improve search result quality and relevance
user_agents.scope: Web crawl to analyze content and enhance search response accuracy
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Claude-SearchBot / Disallow: / in robots.txt to block search indexing

user_agents.name: Googlebot
user_agents.purpose: Building Google Search indexes and general product crawling
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for search indexing, Discover, Images, Video, News

user_agents.name: Googlebot-Image
user_agents.purpose: Image-specific crawling for Google Images and Search features
user_agents.scope: Image URLs for Google Images, Discover, Video, and Search image features

user_agents.name: Googlebot-Video
user_agents.purpose: Video-specific crawling for video-related Google products
user_agents.scope: Video content for Google Search features and video-dependent products

user_agents.name: Googlebot-News
user_agents.purpose: News article crawling for Google News product
user_agents.scope: News content for Google News product and news.google.com

user_agents.name: Storebot-Google
user_agents.purpose: Shopping product crawling for Google Shopping surfaces
user_agents.scope: E-commerce content for Google Shopping and Shopping tab in Search

user_agents.name: Google-InspectionTool
user_agents.purpose: Testing and inspection of search features in Search Console
user_agents.scope: User-triggered fetch for testing Rich Results and URL inspection

user_agents.name: GoogleOther
user_agents.purpose: Generic crawling for various product teams and R&D
user_agents.scope: Publicly accessible content for internal product team one-off crawls

user_agents.name: GoogleOther-Image
user_agents.purpose: Image-specific generic crawling for various product teams
user_agents.scope: Publicly accessible image URLs for internal product team crawls

user_agents.name: GoogleOther-Video
user_agents.purpose: Video-specific generic crawling for various product teams
user_agents.scope: Publicly accessible video URLs for internal product team crawls

user_agents.name: Google-CloudVertexBot
user_agents.purpose: Crawling for site owners building Vertex AI Agents
user_agents.scope: Content crawled for Vertex AI Agent training as requested by site owners

user_agents.name: Google-Extended
user_agents.purpose: Training data collection for Gemini models and grounding
user_agents.scope: Content for Gemini Apps, Vertex AI API for Gemini, and search grounding

user_agents.name: PerplexityBot
user_agents.purpose: Surface and link websites in search results on Perplexity
user_agents.scope: Search result indexing; not for AI training data collection

user_agents.name: Perplexity-User
user_agents.purpose: Support user actions within Perplexity when answering questions
user_agents.scope: User-triggered web page fetches to provide accurate answers; generally ignores robots.txt
user_agents.opt_out: Configure WAF rules or server-level blocking; honors User-Agent header filtering

user_agents.name: Applebot
user_agents.purpose: Power search technology for Spotlight, Siri, and Safari on Apple devices
user_agents.scope: General web crawling for Apple's search integration across ecosystem
user_agents.opt_out: Disallow: / in robots.txt; respects standard robots.txt directives and robots meta tags

user_agents.name: Applebot-Extended
user_agents.purpose: Determine how crawled data can be used for training Apple foundation models powering AI features
user_agents.scope: Does not crawl webpages; only determines usage of data already crawled by Applebot
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Applebot-Extended / Disallow: / in robots.txt to opt-out from generative AI training

user_agents.name: iTMS
user_agents.purpose: Crawl content on Apple Podcasts
user_agents.scope: Only crawls URLs associated with registered content on Apple Podcasts
user_agents.opt_out: iTMS does not follow robots.txt as it is not a general search crawler

user_agents.name: FacebookExternalHit
user_agents.purpose: Crawl shared content on Meta apps to gather title, description, thumbnail image
user_agents.scope: Content shared on Facebook, Instagram, or Messenger; may bypass robots.txt for security checks
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: facebookexternalhit / Disallow: / (may bypass during security/integrity checks)

user_agents.name: Meta-WebIndexer
user_agents.purpose: Improve Meta AI search result quality and enhance relevance/accuracy of responses
user_agents.scope: General web crawl to index content for Meta AI search capabilities

user_agents.name: Meta-ExternalAds
user_agents.purpose: Improve advertising and business-related products and services
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for advertising and business use cases

user_agents.name: Meta-ExternalAgent
user_agents.purpose: Training foundation AI models and improving products by indexing content
user_agents.scope: General web crawl to index content for AI model training and product improvement

user_agents.name: Meta-ExternalFetcher
user_agents.purpose: Fetch links at user request to support agentic AI and help AI navigate websites for tasks
user_agents.scope: User-triggered fetch for live responses; may bypass robots.txt

user_agents.name: Bingbot
user_agents.purpose: Search indexing and ranking
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for Bing search engine

user_agents.name: BingPreview
user_agents.purpose: Preview generation for search results
user_agents.scope: Fetches pages for preview snippets in Bing search results

user_agents.name: User-Agent: Mozilla (Copilot/Copilot Pro)
user_agents.purpose: Content retrieval for AI model training and responses
user_agents.scope: Crawls web content for Copilot AI assistant training and inference
user_agents.opt_out: robots.txt User-agent directive or Microsoft AI principles opt-out mechanisms

user_agents.name: Amazonbot
user_agents.purpose: Improve Amazon products and services; train Amazon AI models
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for AI model training and product improvement
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Amazonbot / Disallow: / in robots.txt; honors robots meta tags noarchive, noindex, none

user_agents.name: Amzn-SearchBot
user_agents.purpose: Improve search experiences in Amazon products and services
user_agents.scope: Crawls content for search indexing in Alexa and Rufus; does not crawl for generative AI training
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Amzn-SearchBot / Disallow: / in robots.txt; honors robots meta tags noindex, none

user_agents.name: Amzn-User
user_agents.purpose: Support user-triggered actions requiring up-to-date information from queries
user_agents.scope: User-triggered fetch for live web information to respond to Alexa queries; does not train generative AI
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Amzn-User / Disallow: / in robots.txt; honors robots meta tags

user_agents.name: CCBot/2.0
user_agents.purpose: Web crawling for public internet dataset creation
user_agents.scope: General web crawl to create a sample dataset of the internet
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: CCBot / Disallow: / in robots.txt file

user_agents.name: CCBot/1.0
user_agents.purpose: Web crawling for public internet dataset creation (legacy)
user_agents.scope: General web crawl to create a sample dataset of the internet

user_agents.name: Agentic crawlers (general)
user_agents.purpose: AI training, content indexing, and autonomous agent operations
user_agents.scope: General web crawl and agent-triggered fetch operations across Cloudflare network

user_agents.name: AI Training crawlers
user_agents.purpose: Training data collection for machine learning models
user_agents.scope: Content crawling for AI model training; can be redirected via Cloudflare redirects

user_agents.name: Verified AI crawlers
user_agents.purpose: Legitimate AI content crawling with publisher-enforced canonical redirects
user_agents.scope: Verified crawlers can be redirected to publisher-preferred pages for content canonicalization
